title: Runner Targets Configuration Schema
description: Schema for yellow-ci runner targets configuration files. Defines runner pools, routing rules, and semantic metadata for CI workflow optimization.

schema.description: Schema version. Must be 1 for this version.

name.description: DNS-safe runner target name (lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens, 2-64 chars).

type.description: Runner type: pool (autoscaling), static-family (group of persistent hosts), static-host (single persistent host).

mode.description: Runner lifecycle: jit_ephemeral (spun up on demand, invisible when idle) or persistent (always registered).

preferred_selector.description: Recommended runs-on label array for this runner target.

best_for.description: Workload types this runner is best suited for. Used for semantic scoring (+15 per match, cap +45).

avoid_for.description: Workload types to avoid on this runner. Used for semantic scoring (-25 per match, cap -50).

notes.description: Operational notes about this runner target.

routing_rules.description: High-level routing guidance for runner assignment. Surfaced via session-start hook systemMessage.
